name: kimable-delegate
description: Delegate execution work from Claude Code to Kimi — passthrough or multi-agent orchestration.
author: mikehenken

agents.name: kimi-delegate
agents.description: Lightweight passthrough to the default kimi CLI. Default agent — fast, no orchestrator.

agents.name: kimi-orchestrate
agents.description: Multi-agent orchestrator via kimable.yaml + 14 subagents. For larger or multi-step tasks.

commands.name: orchestrate
commands.description: Hand the current task to @kimi-orchestrate (multi-agent flow).

commands.name: kimable-mode
commands.description: Switch the active Kimable mode (delegate or orchestrate) for this session.
